Another explanation of the word va-yarek: This indicates that he thinned out (herikan) their numbers by saying to them: What man is there that is fearful and fainthearted? (Deut. 20:8). That is, whosoever is fearful because of his sins and weak (ve-rakh) of heart (fainthearted) on account of his evil deeds, let him return home, lest his heart melt away (ibid.). With this statement, he thinned out their ranks one by one until only Eliezer remained. Whence do we know this? We know it from the nume
